creator: trevor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->open

In a message on the ports list (not sent to GNATS) the submitter wrote: 

I'd like to amend my original pr and ask the Gods of the Ports Tree 
to move the two ports databases/p5-ApacheDBILogConfig and 
p5-ApacheDBILogger to the www category. 

Repo copies are required.
